# Free-Provider Reference Index

Deep-reference documentation for every free-tier (or effectively free) LLM API available for DigiThings. Each file is derived from the machine-readable YAML snapshots at `docs/providers/snapshots/` and updated weekly by the `provider-review` workflow.

**Setup guides** (how to get API keys, wire into LiteLLM): [`docs/providers/`](../providers/)  
**Master catalog** (recommendations, fallback chains): [`docs/LLM_PROVIDERS.md`](../LLM_PROVIDERS.md)  
**Machine-readable snapshots** (parsed by CI): [`docs/providers/snapshots/`](../providers/snapshots/)

---

## Standing Free (no expiry, no credit card)

| Provider | Top Models | Max Context | RPM | RPD | TPM | Privacy | File |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [Google AI Studio](google-ai-studio.md) | gemini-2.5-flash, flash-lite, pro | 2M (pro) / 1M (flash) | 5–15 | 100–1,000 | 250k–1M | ⚠️ trains | [→](google-ai-studio.md) |
| [Groq](groq.md) | llama-3.3-70b-versatile, llama-4-scout | 131k | 30 | 14,400 | 6k–30k | ✅ | [→](groq.md) |

| [SambaNova](sambanova.md) | Meta-Llama-3.3-70B, DeepSeek-R1 | 131k | 20 | ? | ? | ? | [→](sambanova.md) |

| [Ollama Cloud](ollama-cloud.md) | deepseek-v3.1:671b, nemotron-3-super | 1M (nemotron) | GPU-sec budget | — | — | ? | [→](ollama-cloud.md) |

| [Hugging Face](huggingface.md) | $2/mo (PRO) | Llama-3.3-70B, BAAI embeddings | 131k | Model discovery; free embeddings | ? | [→](huggingface.md) |

---

## Decision Matrix: 100k Research Payload

Choosing a provider for a single-shot 100k+ token research payload (e.g., full earnings call + 10-K section + price history summary):

| Priority | Provider | Why |
|---|---|---|
| **#1 Simplest** | Google AI Studio (Flash) | 1M context, free, no chunking, 250 RPD |
| **#2 Privacy + Open** | Mistral Large (Experiment) | 128k context, no CC, 1B tokens/month |
| **#3 Best Quant Reasoning** | DeepSeek via Fireworks | Western-hosted, strongest math, 163k |
| **#4 Highest Volume** | Groq | 14,400 RPD, 128k context, fastest |
| **#5 Backup Chain** | OpenRouter (gemini-2.0-flash-exp:free) | 1M context when AI Studio RPD exhausted |
| **Chunked Bulk** | Cerebras | 1M tokens/day; chunk at 8k |

---

## Privacy Quickref

| Symbol | Meaning |
|---|---|
| ✅ | No training on free-tier data (confirmed) |
| ⚠️ trains | Free-tier prompts used for model training |
| ⚠️ China-hosted | Servers in China; subject to Chinese data law |
| ⚠️ varies | Per-model data policy — check individual cards |
| ? | Not published; treat as unknown |
